hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -q 'git commit' && git diff HEAD~1 --name-only 2>/dev/null | grep -qE '(market_intel|sp500_|market_intelligence)' && echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"CHANGELOG REMINDER: Market Intelligence files were modified in this commit. Update docs/market-intelligence/CHANGELOG.md with the changes under the [Unreleased] section."}}' || true
